ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the property */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the property */,
  "city" TEXT /* Name of the city where the property is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of the property */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the property is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State or province where the property is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "housing_characteristics" (
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of housing characteristics */,
  "housing_median_age" INTEGER /* Median age of the housing units */,
  "total_rooms" INTEGER /* Total number of rooms in all housing units */,
  "total_bedrooms" INTEGER /* Total number of bedrooms in all housing units */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population living in the area */,
  "households" INTEGER /* Total number of households */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of households in the area */,
  "bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "garage" INTEGER /* Indicates if the property has a garage */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., single-family home, apartment, condo) */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "square_feet" INTEGER /* Total square footage of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ocean_proximity" (
  "proximity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each proximity category */,
  "ocean_proximity" TEXT /* Description of the property's proximity to the ocean */,
  "distance_to_ocean" REAL /* Distance to the nearest ocean in miles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proximity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location of the property */,
  "characteristic_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the housing characteristics of the property */,
  "proximity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the ocean proximity category of the property */,
  "median_house_value" REAL /* Median house value for the property */,
  "property_status" TEXT /* Status of the property (e.g., for sale, under contract, sold) */,
  "list_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was listed */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date when the property was sold */,
  "list_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was listed */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the property was sold */,
  "days_on_market" INTEGER /* Number of days the property was on the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_proximity_id FOREIGN KEY ("proximity_id") REFERENCES ocean_proximity ("proximity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_properties_characteristic_id FOREIGN KEY ("characteristic_id") REFERENCES housing_characteristics ("characteristic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., realtor, investor, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the property data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the property data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_trends" (
  "trend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market trend */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for the trend analysis */,
  "trend_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trend period */,
  "trend_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trend period */,
  "trend_description" TEXT /* Description of the market trend observed */,
  "trend_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the trend (e.g., strong, moderate, weak) */,
  "trend_source" TEXT /* Source of the trend data (e.g., internal analysis, external report) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_trends_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location for the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "indicator_value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the economic indicator was recorded */,
  "indicator_source" TEXT /* Source of the economic indicator (e.g., government, private agency) */,
  "indicator_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the economic indicator (e.g., monthly, quarterly, annually) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
